Mohamed Khalil Portfolio

Professional Web Developer

About Me

Hello! I'm Mohamed Khalil, a passionate web developer with a knack for creating dynamic and responsive websites. With a background in computer science and a love for coding, I specialize in front-end development, crafting user-friendly interfaces that provide seamless user experiences.

My journey in web development has been fueled by a desire to bring ideas to life through code, and I thrive on solving complex problems with innovative solutions. When I'm not coding, you can find me exploring new technologies or contributing to open-source projects.

Skills

  • HTML5
  • CSS3
  • JavaScript
  • Angular
  • NestJs
